professional_summary: Systems Architect with a proven track record of building mission-critical, high-availability platforms from the ground up. Founder of MGzon, a comprehensive 6M-line ERP ecosystem with fintech, real-time chat (WebSockets), and multi-vendor e-commerce capabilities. Expert in designing resilient, event-driven microservices and zero-downtime distributed systems. Proven track record of building production-ready fintech systems with PCI-DSS compliance, automated failover, and custom monitoring infrastructure.

education.institution: Faculty of Computers and Information, Alexandria University, Egypt

key_projects.name: MGzon - Enterprise ERP Platform
achievements: Architected and independently developed MGzon, a 6M-line e-commerce and ERP ecosystem serving 10,000+ users across 5 countries.
Designed and implemented a scalable microservices architecture with decoupled frontend, backend, and WebSocket servers, handling over 1M monthly requests while reducing server load by 99%
Built MGpay, a PCI-DSS compliant digital wallet and payment orchestration system integrated with Stripe, PayPal, and Visa.
Developed a real-time chat infrastructure using WebSockets and event-driven communication patterns.
Integrated LLM-powered features (MGZON-AI) utilizing RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and agentic workflows.
Implemented a custom health monitoring and automated reporting system, resulting in a time saving of 20+ hours per week.

key_projects.name: Next.js & Vercel Core Architecture Contribution
achievements: Diagnosed a critical platform-specific design flaw: searchParams and other dynamic APIs (cookies, headers) were empty on statically generated pages when Draft Mode was enabled, but only on Vercel.
Led the investigation, submitted a core fix in Next.js (#93063), and engaged with the Vercel/Next.js teams, providing extensive cross-platform testing evidence.
Engineered a targeted, minimal patch in the Vercel builder (+54/-22 lines) to preserve dynamic execution paths for preview-mode requests.
The fix was officially packaged and released as @vercel/next v4.16.9.

key_projects.name: Naseej - Multi-Vendor E-Commerce Platform
achievements: Single-handedly built a complete multi-vendor e-commerce platform featuring real-time chat, a GraphQL API, and integrated payment processing in 5 days (25,810 lines of code).
Designed a resilient 3-server distributed architecture (Frontend, Backend, WebSocket) deployed via Docker.

responsibilities: Architected and developed the entire MGzon platform from inception to 10,000+ active users.
Scaled backend infrastructure to reliably process 100,000+ daily batch transactions and 50,000+ daily webhook events.
Achieved an 85% reduction in production incidents by implementing a custom observability and alerting stack.
Established and enforced best practices for clean architecture, code maintainability, and security-first development.
Delivered 15+ custom web applications for a diverse client base across the MENA region.
Specialized in building bespoke e-commerce platforms, integrating complex third-party APIs, and managing Linux-based deployments.

soft_skills: Strong client acquisition and persuasion skills
Time management and ability to work under pressure

favorite_quote: Linux-first development. Clean architecture principles. Systems designed for 10x scalability. Security implemented at every layer.
If you want to set a goal, set it at the stars. Because even if you lose this goal, you will definitely reach the moon. Motivate yourself constantly because you deserve to be the best.
